ab: I Rinahemay ku luma’ nu niyam.
U tamdaw nu luma’ nu niyam lalima.
en: There are five people in our family.

ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: Makumud ku aru’ nu maku aci ama, ina, atu kaka tu vavainayan, kaka tu vavahiyan.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: Tarakaw ci ama aku, u malakincalay ci ama nu maku.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: Makupit ci ina aku, u ising ci ina nu maku.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: Anu i luma’ tu ci ama, u nu Pangcah tu ku nikasasuwal niyam.
ch: 爸爸在家就會和我們說阿美族語。
en: My father speaks the Pangcah language with us at home.

ab: I pahanhan nu laludan, taluma’ tu kami i niyaru’.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: Mahekulung kami a malekaka a milepel tu tatakula’.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: Maulah kaku tu tamdaw nu luma’ nu niyam.
en: I like our family very much.
